inventoryPolicy.sourceOfTruth: Git tree on the referenced commit
inventoryPolicy.contentIdentity: Git blob SHA and commit history
notes: This is a maintained inventory, not a self-referential checksum list.
Each managed path appears in exactly one machine inventory section; human documents may cross-reference it in multiple reading lists.
Tagged release bundles may later include a CI-generated checksummed manifest.
Archive files are historical and never implementation inputs.
Only archive files that actually exist in Git history are listed.
Canonical primitive wire formats are defined in schemas/primitives.ts and spec/18.
Shared persisted vocabulary is defined in schemas/domain-types.ts.
Stable errors are defined in schemas/error-codes.ts.
Shared local API command and envelope vocabulary is defined in schemas/api-types.ts.
Durable Operation ledger vocabulary is defined in schemas/operation-types.ts and spec/19.
Cross-record cardinality and nullability are defined in docs/RECORD-INVARIANT-MATRIX.md.
The dependency-free documentation conformance checker and its mutation tests are under conformance/.
The research-only Stage 0.5 validation, metric analysis, templates, and tests are under research/stage-0.5/.
ADR-0013 and the Stage 0.5 contract gate production scaffold work on a recorded proceed decision.
The repository is pre-scaffold and not yet licensed for public reuse.
Intentional old-name, abbreviated digest, and migration references require context-aware conformance allowlists rather than blind token rejection.
